---
title: "Suplementary_1"
output: html_document
date: "2025-12-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(pheatmap)
library(stringr)
library(scales)
```

###Seqkit stats
```{r cars}
long_stats = read.delim("long_read_stats.tsv", sep = "\t" , header = TRUE)
long_stats
```


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
long_stats = long_stats %>% mutate(
  num_seqs = as.numeric(gsub("," , "", num_seqs)),
  sum_len = as.numeric(gsub("," , "", sum_len)),
)

head(long_stats)
```

```{r}
df2 <- long_stats %>%
  mutate(
    Sample  = str_extract(file, "PAW\\d+"),
    DATASET = str_extract(file, "HG\\d{3}")
  ) %>%
  select(-file)
head(df2)
```
```{r}
new_stats = read.delim("new_datasets_stats_for_R.tsv", sep = "\t", header= TRUE)
new_stats
```


```{r}
new_stats$file <- as.character(new_stats$file)

new_stats$num_seqs <- as.numeric(gsub(",", "", new_stats$num_seqs))
new_stats$sum_len  <- as.numeric(gsub(",", "", new_stats$sum_len))

```

```{r}
new_stats$short_file <- new_stats$file %>%
  basename() %>%
  str_replace("_R941.*", "")

new_stats$file=new_stats$short_file
new_stats$short_file= NULL
new_stats
```

```{r}
df2_clean <- df2

names(df2_clean)[names(df2_clean) == "Sample"]  <- "file"
names(df2_clean)[names(df2_clean) == "DATASET"] <- "Dataset"

df2_clean <- df2_clean[, c("file", "num_seqs", "sum_len", "Dataset")]

df2_clean
```
```{r}
final_df_stats <- rbind(new_stats, df2_clean)
```

```{r}
p1 <- ggplot(final_df_stats, aes(x = file, y = num_seqs)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#4fa3df") +
  facet_wrap(~Dataset, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +   # no notación científica
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Number of sequences per sample",
    x = "Sample",
    y = "num_seqs"
  )

p2 <- ggplot(final_df_stats, aes(x = file, y = sum_len)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#1f78b4") +
  facet_wrap(~Dataset, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "SumLen per Sample",
    x = "Sample",
    y = "sum_len"
  )
```


####Coverage
```{r}
coverage = read.delim("coverage_all.txt", header= TRUE , sep = "\t")
coverage
```

```{r}
library(RColorBrewer)

plot_coverage=ggplot(coverage, aes(x = file, y = coverage, fill = Dataset)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~ Dataset, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = brewer.pal(9, "Blues")[4:9]) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position= "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Coverage per sample",
    x = "Sample",
    y = "Coverage (X)"
  )
```


####NGSCheck
```{r}
corr_matrix= read.delim("output_all.txt", sep = "\t", col.names = c("Sample1","matched/unmatched","Sample2","Correlation", "Depth"))
```

```{r}
corr_matrix$Sample1 <- as.character(corr_matrix$Sample1)
corr_matrix$Sample2 <- as.character(corr_matrix$Sample2)

corr_matrix$Sample1 <- trimws(corr_matrix$Sample1)
corr_matrix$Sample2 <- trimws(corr_matrix$Sample2)


samples <- sort(unique(c(corr_matrix$Sample1, corr_matrix$Sample2)))
n <- length(samples)

mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n, ncol = n,
              dimnames = list(samples, samples))

for(i in seq_len(nrow(corr_matrix))) {
  s1 <- corr_matrix$Sample1[i]
  s2 <- corr_matrix$Sample2[i]
  cval <- as.numeric(corr_matrix$Correlation[i])
  if(is.na(cval)) next
  # si ya hay un valor distinto a NA, promediar
  prev <- mat[s1, s2]
  if(!is.na(prev) && !is.na(cval) && prev != cval) {
    mat[s1, s2] <- mean(c(prev, cval), na.rm = TRUE)
    mat[s2, s1] <- mat[s1, s2]
  } else {
    mat[s1, s2] <- cval
    mat[s2, s1] <- cval
  }
}

diag(mat) <- 1

min_corr <- min(as.numeric(corr_matrix$Correlation), na.rm = TRUE)
if(!is.finite(min_corr)) min_corr <- 0
mat[is.na(mat)] <- min_corr

dist_mat <- 1 - mat
diag(dist_mat) <- 0
hc <- hclust(as.dist(dist_mat), method = "average")

ord <- hc$order
mat_ord <- mat[ord, ord]
samples_ord <- rownames(mat_ord)

paleta_azul <- colorRampPalette(
  c("#e0f7fa", "#81d4fa", "#29b6f6", "#0288d1", "#01579b")
)(100)

ngscheck=pheatmap(
  mat_ord,
  color = paleta_azul,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = TRUE,
  display_numbers = FALSE,        # cambiar a FALSE si resulta muy apretado
  number_format = "%.3f",
  fontsize_number = 8,
  fontsize = 9,
  border_color = NA,
  main = "Correlation between samples"
)
```

```{r}
library(ggplotify)
ggngs_check = as.ggplot(ngscheck)
```

```{r}
library(patchwork)
png("stats_for_paper.png", res = 200, width = 2300 , height = 2800)
(p1 | p2 ) / (plot_coverage | ggngs_check) 

dev.off()
```
